name: ppt-master
desc: AI turns documents or topics into real, native PowerPoint decks—with native shapes, transitions and animations, data-backed charts and tables on demand, audio …
descFull: AI turns documents or topics into real, native PowerPoint decks—with native shapes, transitions and animations, data-backed charts and tables on demand, audio narration from speaker notes, and support for your own .pptx templates. · by Hugo He
